mapper.select: SELECT C_POST_ID, TITLE, C_CONTENT, WRITER, C_VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM C_BOARD ORDER BY C_POST_ID DESC
SELECT C_POST_ID, TITLE, C_CONTENT, WRITER, C_VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM C_BOARD WHERE C_POST_ID = #{cPostId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_BOARD ( C_POST_ID, TITLE, C_CONTENT, WRITER, C_VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( C_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{cContent}, #{writer}, 0, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE C_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, C_CONTENT = #{cContent}, WRITER = #{writer}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE C_POST_ID = #{cPostId}
